action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ER model trained with 2 epochs/task, 20 exemplars/class, val accuracy only 0.0916 (barely above random). Analysis: Catastrophic forgetting is severe; replay buffer too small and training insufficient. Decision: Submit eval now to get baseline test score and measure time; then improve drastically with larger replay buffer (store all exemplars), longer training per task, and possibly knowledge distillation. Next iteration will rewrite train.py with full replay and better training loop.
